_source: gin7 manual pp.30-32 (printed) / digest cites pp.31-33 via logh7-manual-canon.md §6
_pdf_pages_read: gin7manual.pdf physical pages 30-32 (0-indexed); printed page labels 30,31,32
_confidence_notes: PDF-verified against gin7manual.pdf (PyMuPDF text extract) — terrain list, navigability gate, warp rules and the 4-tier movement hierarchy all confirmed verbatim.

CRITICAL CORRECTION vs task spec: the manual navigability section (地形による制限, printed p30) lists ONLY two impassable terrain obstacles — プラズマ嵐 (plasma storm) and サルガッソ・スペース (Sargasso space). It does NOT list variable-star / red-giant / abnormal-gravity zones anywhere on pp30-32. Those extra types from the spec are NOT canon on these pages; do not encode them as impassable from this source.

Grid type 航行不能グリッド (non-navigable grid) is a distinct, always-impassable grid type ('原則的にユニットが一切進入できない') separate from terrain obstacles. Two impassability mechanisms: (a) the grid TYPE is 航行不能, or (b) a navigable grid CONTAINS a terrain obstacle (plasma storm / Sargasso).
Cell size 100 ly is restated here (also p19/p31 in digest §6.1).

Warp distance ranges / exact 航続 (cruising-range) consumption per grid hop are NOT given as a numeric table on these pages; only the hard floor '航続 < 100 → cannot warp' is stated. Cost-per-distance is _uncertain.

The 4-tier movement hierarchy is expressed in the manual as which 職務権限カード (job-authority card) holds each command, not as an explicit numbered tier list. Tiers below are our synthesis from the card type + scope; the card assignment itself is verbatim.
独行艦 (lone flagship) gloss: a flagship unit travelling solo (no escorting 艦艇 fleet).

grid_system.cell_size_note: 戦略地図は100光年単位のグリッドで区切られている (strategic map divided into 100-ly grid cells); all strategic movement is in grid units.

grid_types.desc: 何もない宇宙空間のグリッド (empty space cell, nothing in it)
星系を含むグリッド (cell containing a star system — planets/fortresses)
grid_types.entry_note: Entering a star-system grid requires first warping into an ADJACENT grid; you cannot warp directly into a star-system grid from a long distance (遠距離から一度のワープで星系グリッドには入れない).

grid_types.desc: 原則的にユニットが一切進入できないグリッド (in principle NO unit may enter this grid at all)

navigability_gate.summary: 戦略地図の1グリッドに対しては、ユニットが侵入できるかどうかの制限があり、制限に抵触するグリッドには移動できない。(Each strategic grid cell has restrictions on whether a unit may enter; a unit cannot move into a cell that violates any restriction.)
navigability_gate.ko: 각 그리드 셀에는 진입 가능 여부 제한이 있으며, 제한에 저촉되는 셀로는 이동할 수 없다.

restrictions.rule: 1つの陣営で300ユニット以下に制限。300ユニットが既に存在するグリッドには進入不可。
restrictions.includes_note: 惑星守備隊などの陸戦隊も含む (planet garrisons / ground-combat troops are counted in the 300 cap).
restrictions.all_or_nothing_note: 部隊が進入するには所属する全ユニット分の制限数の余地が必要。一部ユニットだけの進入は不可。(A 部隊/fleet needs headroom for ALL its units; you cannot send only some units of a fleet.)

restrictions.rule: 1つのグリッドに存在できるのは2陣営まで。
restrictions.regular_vs_rebel_note: 勢力が同じであっても正規軍陣営と叛乱軍陣営は別々にカウントされる (even within the same power, the regular-army faction and the rebel-army faction are counted SEPARATELY).

restrictions.ja: 旗艦ユニット単独航行の制限
restrictions.rule: 独行艦は、独行艦以外の敵ユニットが存在する、または敵惑星/要塞が存在する星系グリッドへ進入できない。
restrictions.rule_en: A lone flagship (独行艦) may NOT enter a star-system grid that contains non-lone enemy units OR an enemy planet/fortress.
restrictions.exception: ただし、味方の艦艇ユニットが存在し戦術ゲーム中のグリッドであれば、この制限は適用されない。
restrictions.exception_en: EXCEPTION: the restriction does NOT apply if a friendly fleet unit is present and a tactical game is in progress in that grid.

restrictions.rule: 地形障害（プラズマ嵐やサルガッソ・スペース）が存在するグリッドには、いかなる旗艦/艦艇ユニットも進入できない。
restrictions.rule_en: No flagship or fleet unit may enter a grid containing a terrain obstacle.

impassable_terrain.ja: サルガッソ・スペース

restrictions._note: These are the ONLY two terrain obstacles named on manual pp30-32. Variable-star / red-giant / abnormal-gravity zones are NOT listed here (see _confidence_notes).

warp_navigation.summary: 戦略地図上のグリッド間の移動はワープ航行で行う (movement between grids on the strategic map is done via warp navigation).
warp_navigation.ko: 전략 지도상 그리드 간 이동은 워프 항행으로 수행한다.

rules.rule: ワープ航行によってグリッド間を移動できる。(Warp navigation moves a unit between grids.)
星系グリッドに入る場合には、一度、隣接するグリッドにワープする必要がある。遠距離から1度のワープで星系グリッドに入ることはできない。
rules.rule_en: To enter a star-system grid you must first warp into an ADJACENT grid; you cannot enter a star-system grid in a single long-distance warp.

rules.rule: 長距離のワープを実行した場合、最終的な到着地点に誤差が生じる場合がある。誤差発生時の到着地点は、当初の目標グリッドに隣接するどれかの空間グリッドに移動してしまう。
rules.rule_en: Long-distance warps may incur arrival error; on error the unit ends up displaced to one of the SPACE grids adjacent to the intended target grid.
rules.displaces_to: adjacent 空間グリッド (space grid)

rules.rule: ワープ航行を行う際に「航続」を消費する。航続が100に満たない場合にはワープ航行を実行できない。
rules.rule_en: Each warp consumes 航続 (cruising range). If 航続 < 100, the warp cannot be executed.
rules._uncertain_note: Exact 航続 consumption per warp (per distance/hop) is NOT given as a numeric table on pp30-32; only the floor of 100 is stated.

movement_command_hierarchy.summary: 全てのコマンドは『職務権限カード』を通して実行される。移動コマンドはカードの種類とスコープで4段階に分かれる。(All commands are executed via job-authority cards; movement commands form a 4-tier hierarchy by card type and spatial scope.)
movement_command_hierarchy.card_note: 全キャラクターは最低限「個人」「艦長」カードを保有。1キャラクター当たりカード最大16枚。(Every character holds at minimum the 個人/Personal and 艦長/Captain cards; max 16 cards per character.)

tiers.ui_path: 職務権限カードタブ → 艦長カード → [ワープ航行] → 可能グリッド選択 → [決定]

tiers.scope: between planets within the same star system
tiers.mechanism_en: intra-system navigation (move between planets in the same star system)
tiers.ui_path: 職務権限カードタブ → 艦長カード → [寄港] → 移動可能な惑星一覧 → 惑星名選択
職務権限カードタブ → 個人カード → [遠距離移動] → 移動可能な施設一覧 → 施設名選択

tiers.spot_note: 施設の中にはスポットと呼ばれる部屋に区切られたものがある (some facilities are divided into rooms called 'spots').
tiers.ui_path: 職務権限カードタブ → 個人カード → [近距離移動] → 移動可能なスポット一覧 → スポット名選択

server_model_hooks._note: Implementation guidance for the strategic grid 0x0315 navigability model and corridor adjacency. Not from manual; derived mapping for the revival.
server_model_hooks.navigable_gate_rule: A grid is enterable by a unit iff: grid_type != 航行不能グリッド AND no terrain obstacle (plasma storm / Sargasso) present AND unit_count(faction) + incoming_units <= 300 AND faction_count_after_entry <= 2 (regular vs rebel armies counted separately) AND lone-flagship rule satisfied. Per project memory the client-side gate is objectTable[V].byte1 ∈ {1,3}; this manual rule is the design authority for which cells the server must mark navigable/impassable.
server_model_hooks.corridor_adjacency_note: Iserlohn/Phezzan corridor adjacency = the only navigable space-grid path between regions; non-navigable grids and terrain-obstacle grids form the corridor walls. Star-system grids require an adjacent-grid hop before entry (no direct long warp).
